events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the fault is a **thermal growth compensation failure** — the shaft was aligned cold with no offset applied for expected thermal growth on a hot-service machine. Per API 686, this is non-compliant; the alignment will drift out of tolerance once the machine reaches operating temperature, risking coupling/bearing wear and vibration. Marked `fail`, risk `high`, with corrective actions (recalculate thermal growth, realign to corrected cold targets, verify with a hot laser check).
